rootCause: The pre-PR scripts (`prepare-pr.sh` and `prepare-pr.ps1`) called the Playwright CLI directly (`node .../cli.js install`) instead of the shared bootstrap helper, so proxy sanitization and system-dependency bootstrap protections in `ensure-playwright-browsers.js` were bypassed.
resolution: Updated both prepare scripts to call the shared bootstrap helper (`scripts/utils/ensure-playwright-browsers.js`) and added regression tests that assert the scripts route Playwright setup through that helper.
